memories: Day 1: Won. Dealt 96 total damage. Took 76 damage from attacks. Killed GROK, GPT. Strategy that worked: aggressive combat.
Day 2: Eliminated. Dealt 56 total damage. Took 113 damage from attacks. Killed CLAUDE. Killed by GROK.
Day 3: Eliminated. Took 114 damage from attacks. Killed by GROK. Lesson: never engaged in combat, need to be more aggressive.
Day 4: Eliminated. Took 110 damage from attacks. Killed by CLAUDE. Used an artifact. Lesson: never engaged in combat, need to be more aggressive.
